fix(model-3d): fix push-pull preview with position-matching and wall geometry

Two fixes for push-pull preview during drag:

1. Position-match vertex selection: Instead of only moving the face's
   own triangle vertices (which left adjacent faces unchanged, causing
   the face to "float"), now finds ALL buffer vertices at the same
   positions as the face's unique vertices. This moves adjacent face
   copies of shared vertices too, so sides stretch correctly during
   preview. Still excludes other coplanar faces' unique vertices.

2. Wall preview geometry: During push-pull drag, renders translucent
   side wall quads connecting the face outline to its offset position.
   Shows the extrusion volume growing in real-time instead of just
   the face translating.

fix: remove stale CSP from vercel.json that blocked Clerk on production

The vercel.json had a hardcoded Content-Security-Policy that was
overriding the correct, comprehensive CSP from next.config.mjs.

The stale CSP's script-src only allowed *.clerk.accounts.dev (dev)
but was missing clerk.instantmed.com.au and *.clerk.com (production),
causing Clerk's JavaScript to be completely blocked by the browser.

This was the root cause of both production issues:
- Sign-in button invisible (Clerk's <SignedOut> never rendered)
- Post-signin spinner stuck forever (Clerk JS never loaded)

The CSP in next.config.mjs already handles all domains correctly
with environment-aware logic.

fix(xlsx): detect columns with empty first-row cells in SheetJS parsing

SheetJS's sheet_to_json() by default omits keys for cells whose value is
empty. When a column like 'נושא' (title) is redacted/empty in the very
first data row, it was missing from Object.keys(records[0]) and therefore
never appeared in the 'fields' array — making it invisible to the
heuristic field-mapper and appearing as "unrecognized" in the import UI.

Fix: pass { defval: '' } so every header column always appears in every
record. Also filter out SheetJS placeholder keys (__EMPTY*) that arise
from blank header cells.

  awaitLaunch returns 'queued' immediately

  includes queued phase; health exposes queueDepth; orphan/shutdown recovery

fix: replace broken GPG export via Bun.spawn with manual instruction

Bun.spawn cannot properly hand off TTY to pinentry on macOS, causing
timeout errors during key export. Instead, print the export command
and wait for the user to run it in their terminal.

commit.message:
Initial release of Minecraft Manager web panel

Full-featured browser-based control panel for a Minecraft Forge server:
- Server start/stop/restart with live console streaming via WebSocket
- Mod manager with Modrinth search, download, enable/disable, and SHA1-based
  side detection (client/server/both) for all installed mods
- Player management: operators (levels 1-4), whitelist, bans via RCON or direct
  file editing when server is offline
- server.properties editor with key settings highlighted
- Password-protected web UI with session tokens

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
